text.title: Finetune Cost Vs Prompt Decision Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a Finetune Cost Vs Prompt Decision deliverable. Subagent must satisfy this before returning.

field.name: trigger
field.description: the named activity or event that invoked this methodology

field.name: rules_applied
field.description: rule ids from content/01-core-rules.xml that the artefact satisfies

field.name: output_payload
field.description: the methodology-specific structured output (schema in templates/output-schema.json)

field.name: consumer
field.description: named human or downstream agent that will act on this artefact

field.name: owner
field.description: single named human responsible for the artefact

forbidden.pattern: artefact produced without any evidence entry referencing a rule_id
consumer field empty or set to 'team' / 'everyone' — orphan artefacts
rules_applied references rule ids not present in content/01-core-rules.xml
LLM-generated evidence citing 'industry standard' or 'common practice' without a named source
applies_if guard failed AND artefact still produced (must be a skip with reason)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim verbatim citations for length, preserving specifics (numbers, dates, named tools).
Group similar evidence entries when they cite the same source, preserving member count.
Promote an evidence entry to a 'finding' record when it surfaces a remediation requirement.

list.item: Every required field is populated with a non-placeholder value.
Every rule in rules_applied has ≥1 matching evidence entry.
Consumer is a named human or named agent — never 'team'.
If applies_if conditions fail, output_payload is empty and a skip reason is recorded instead.
